name: Destroy Sarcophagus
brief: Overload a damaged stasis crypt while tomb systems attempt to repair it.
objective: Accumulate 20 Destruction points on the sarcophagus.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within Player B territory. Put half, rounding down, in the sarcophagus room and spread the remainder across the other rooms.

rules.name: Sarcophagus
rules.summary: Treat C1 as an objective marker. Breach performed within its control range adds 2D6 Destruction points instead of normal Breach effects.

rules.name: Nanoscarab Repair
rules.timing: Ready step of each Strategy phase
rules.summary: Roll D6, subtracting 1 for each player operative controlling the sarcophagus, and remove that many Destruction points, to a minimum of 0.

victory.win: The sarcophagus has 20 or more Destruction points.
